prompt: Refactor AgentOrchestrator: extract prompt assembly (private toPromptMessages and any private helpers it exclusively needs) into a new class PromptAssembler in package com.tepeu.agent. AgentOrchestrator must use PromptAssembler for building the Prompt message list (constructor-injected @Component, or a plain class constructed inside AgentOrchestrator — either is fine). Preserve MAX_HISTORY_MESSAGES == 50 behavior. Do not change ChatService tool registration. Keep the change focused. Ensure backend compiles (mvn -q -DskipTests compile in backend/).
